description: Strict AND-vector non-admission check for external witness payloads pending cryptographic verification.

gate_rule.closure_logic: gate_closure_allowed may equal true only when every required check current_value equals true

checks.description: The witness originates from a configured external source listed in allowed_witness_providers.
The payload bytes are identical to the referenced canonical artifact by cryptographic hash match, with no modification.
The witness includes a verifiable external timestamp such as commit date, block timestamp, or workflow run timestamp.
No simulated or synthetic success markers are claimed; the object preserves non-admission until external verification succeeds.
The witness check does not assert authority; it only records observable admission status.

notes: It does not admit the witness.
It does not close the gate.
